title: WireGuard Support
body:

@b-m-f are you still interested in this?  If not I will close.

Hi @rhatdan ,

i sure am. https://github.com/containers/netavark/pull/472 is waiting for official plugin support in netavark. 

Until that is all done i cant say whether the changes in this PR will stay as they are.

Implemented with netvarks plugin feature and https://github.com/b-m-f/netavark-wireguard-plugin
